title: POST /books endpoint implemented
evidence: src/lib.rs:106-132 create_book handler creates books with title, author, year, isbn

title: GET /books with author filter implemented
evidence: src/lib.rs:134-157 list_books supports optional ?author= query parameter

title: GET /books/{id} endpoint implemented
evidence: src/lib.rs:159-175 get_book retrieves single book by ID

title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint implemented
evidence: src/lib.rs:177-208 update_book updates existing book and returns updated record

title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint implemented
evidence: src/lib.rs:210-222 delete_book removes book, returns 204 NO_CONTENT

title: Rust language and framework used
evidence: Cargo.toml specifies axum 0.7 (async Rust web framework)

title: SQLite database implemented
evidence: src/lib.rs:58-82 uses rusqlite with both file and in-memory backends

title: JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
Input validation for required fields
evidence: src/lib.rs:112-117, 184-189 validate title and author are not empty, return 400 Bad Request

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md provides clear setup, run, and test instructions

title: 4 integration tests exceed minimum of 3
evidence: tests/api.rs contains 4 async tests all passing
